title: make lint: extend checks
body:
This PR includes a series of commits to extend the linter checks to include:
* `pkg/tracing`
* `docs/`
* unit tests (i.e., `_test.go` files)

Especially checking the unit tests could make CI more robust as rigorous error checks could reveal flakes.

The only thing pending is a Prow test, so I'll go ahead and whack this

git hooks have been dropping for prow btw, the suggestion is to spam retest until it triggers
/retest
